_meta.purpose: THE curated whole-game team archetype(s) the TeamPlanner plans against - the 'balanced 6 a guide-literate human builds toward the E4 from the start'. It is a MENU she chooses from (soul: SHE picks, seeded by her real starter + favorites), never a solver's dictation. Holds: the 6 target slots (role + species + coverage + WHERE/WHEN to acquire), the acquisition ORDER (earliest-due / highest-multiplicity first), the single-use-TM teach plan, per-threat answer mapping (for the lookahead), and level milestones (ace + small margin - watchable, never max-grind).
_meta.source: Composed from frlg_rosters (the actual threats) + frlg_strategy (answers) + frlg_encounters (where) + FRLG playthrough knowledge. Bulbasaur-start branch is primary (canonical starter). Portable-engine split: this whole file is the swappable FireRed game-knowledge layer.
_meta.watchability: level_milestones = leader-ace + small margin (a brief struggle, not a stomp). Detours are bounded + only when an acquisition is DUE and cheaply reachable. A grind-wall is a FAILURE.

archetypes.name: balanced-classic
archetypes.summary: Venusaur core + a Psychic sweeper (Kadabra) that carries the whole poison/fighting/ghost mid-late game, a Ground answer (Dugtrio) for Surge + Earthquake coverage, an Arcanine for Erika/fire, a Snorlax bulk-tank as a TM coverage platform, and Lapras as the E4 MVP (Ice Beam = the Lance dragon-slayer). Covers every gym+E4 answer type except Sabrina's bug/ghost - handled by out-speeding with Kadabra / Shadow Ball, or the optional Gastly swap.

slots.why: her starter + heart of the team; Razor Leaf @20 is the early carry, Sleep Powder locks threats

slots.trade_dead_end: alakazam needs a trade (solo run keeps Kadabra - still elite)
slots.why: HIGHEST-LEVERAGE catch - one Abra answers Koga AND Sabrina AND Bruno AND Agatha. Grab it right after Misty
hard-counters Lt. Surge (Electric can't touch Ground) and becomes the Earthquake user for Koga/Blaine/Agatha

evolve.note: evolve LATE or just TM Flamethrower - Arcanine's level pool is thin

slots.why: the clean Erika sweep + fire coverage for bugs/ice/grass
a colossal wall that TMs almost anything - the E4 bulk + a second Earthquake/Ice-Beam platform; no Center in the E4, so the six need bulk
THE E4 MVP - Ice Beam is 4x on Lance's Dragonite (the dragon-slayer), Thunderbolt cracks Lorelei + Gyarados, Surf is STAB vs Blaine/Giovanni

archetypes.coverage_notes: electric + ghost + a second ice/ground come from single-use TMs on Lapras/Snorlax/Kadabra rather than dedicated slots. Sabrina (bug/ghost/dark answer) is the one type-gap - covered by Kadabra out-speeding + Shadow Ball, or swap the Gastly alternative.

acquisition_order.why: earliest-due, highest-multiplicity gap - psychic carries four threats
the Surge hard-counter + the game's best Ground/Earthquake body
fire answer to the grass gym; fire coverage all game
bulk + TM coverage platform for the gauntlet
the E4 MVP; Ice Beam is the dragon-slayer

threat_answers._doc: per-threat: which of MY slots answers it (for the lookahead union). Used to compute 'which gap, acquired earliest, serves the most threats'.

Sabrina.note: no clean STAB answer - out-speed Alakazam with Kadabra, or Shadow Ball, or the Gastly swap

Lance.note: Lapras Ice Beam is the signature answer - 4x on Dragonite

Champion.note: the fight the whole balanced six exists for

archetypes.name: sabrina-swap-option
archetypes.summary: An OPTIONAL variant that trades the normal-tank slot for a dedicated Sabrina/Agatha ghost answer.

slots.trade_dead_end: gengar needs a trade (solo keeps Haunter)
slots.why: a dedicated Bug/Ghost-fearing psychic-killer for Sabrina; Shadow Ball also nukes Agatha
